generated_oml:
instance LivingLabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in AECO domain as a Living Lab for real-time monitoring and optimization of building operations through unified virtual representations of physical assets"
    base:contains IndoorTemperatureSensor, IndoorHumiditySensor, DaylightSensor, OccupancySensor, CO2Sensor, HVACController, LightingActuator, BlindsController, BIMModel
]

instance IndoorTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor within Building Control Systems (BCS) providing real-time operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance IndoorHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor within Building Control Systems (BCS) providing real-time operational data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance DaylightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light sensor within Building Control Systems (BCS) for visual comfort monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DaylightDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor within Building Control Systems (BCS) for space utilization monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 sensor within Building Control Systems (BCS) for indoor air quality monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorTemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IndoorHumiditySensor
]

instance DaylightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DaylightSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from BCS sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity readings from BCS sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance DaylightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time daylight levels for visual comfort adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DaylightDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data for space utilization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 concentration data for indoor air quality"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based model containing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components, enriched with runtime metadata for devices and middleware (Hono/Ditto)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling building geometry and spatial data"
    DTDFVocab:enables Simulation, EnergyOptimization, VisualComfortAdjustment
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data exchange and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, EnergyOptimization, VisualComfortAdjustment, NonVisualHealthManagement
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, EnergyOptimization, VisualComfortAdjustment, NonVisualHealthManagement
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualization
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering methodologies for automated transformation of BIM models to runtime artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables Simulation, EnergyOptimization
]

instance BOREALIS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework for iterative control policy improvement"
    DTDFVocab:enables EnergyOptimization, NonVisualHealthManagement
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance Simulation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building performance simulation for operational analysis and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, EnergyOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjustment of lighting and shading for optimal visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight, VisualComfortAction
]

instance NonVisualHealthManagement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Management of non-visual health effects through environmental control"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectsInsight, HealthEffectsAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building systems using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of building systems for facility management"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive outcomes from building performance simulations"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption reduction"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of visual comfort levels based on lighting conditions"
]

instance HealthEffectsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of non-visual health impacts from environmental factors"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations for decision support"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of HVAC and lighting systems for energy savings"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of blinds and lighting for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HealthEffectsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control of ventilation and air quality to mitigate health effects"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system controller for temperature and airflow regulation"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator for adjusting brightness and color temperature"
]

instance BlindsController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Blinds controller for adjusting shading based on daylight levels"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT sent to actuators in the BCS via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time adjustment of building systems."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization for data exchange and service execution."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular system where BIM serves as the semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and service-oriented extensions for monitoring, control, and optimization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from design, construction, operation, to refurbishments, with the case study focused on operational phase."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess alignment with physical counterpart; synchronization techniques to prevent semantic drift over time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional real-time communication between physical assets and the DT."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to BIM standards as the semantic backbone; use of standardized extension points and model-driven engineering for consistent data schemas."
]
